description: As part of a firewall replacement project, a technician needs to configure the new firewall.

nodes.task_description: Review the discovery documentation to understand all the required firewall rules, VPN tunnels, and network segments.

expected_outcome.expected: The technician has a complete list of configuration requirements.

nodes.task_description: Configure the new firewall with all the required settings in a staging environment.

expected_outcome.expected: The firewall is fully configured before being deployed.

nodes.task_description: Save the final configuration and prepare for the physical installation.

expected_outcome.expected: The configuration is backed up and ready for deployment.
